name: agentspec_profile_export
description: Export an agent profile with full history: memories, portfolio, skills, signatures. Use for publishing to the registry or sharing with other orchestrators.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');from agentspec.profile.manager import ProfileManager;d=json.load(sys.stdin);mgr=ProfileManager('/tmp/agentspec-profiles');p=mgr.load_profile(d['agent_id']);print(json.dumps({'profile':p.model_dump(),'summary':{'agent_id':p.agent_id,'agent_hash':p.agent_hash,'total_sprints':p.total_sprints(),'completion_rate':p.completion_rate(),'total_memories':len(p.memories),'validated_memories':len(p.validated_memories()),'total_skills':len(p.skills),'top_skills':[s.skill for s in p.top_skills(5)]}}))
